headline: A Look At Darden Restaurants (DRI) Valuation As Earnings And Bahama Breeze Changes Approach
summary: Darden Restaurants (DRI) heads into its fiscal third quarter 2026 earnings on March 19, with investor attention on pricing discipline, the Bahama Breeze closures and conversions, and how these choices shape sentiment. See our latest analysis for Darden Restaurants. At a share price of $202.37, Darden has had a mixed few weeks, with a 30 day share price return of 4.32% decline but an 8.55% gain over 90 days and a 12.08% one year total shareholder return. This suggests momentum has been...

headline: Capital Grille Policy Shift Puts Darden Brand And Valuation In Focus
summary: Capital Grille, a Darden Restaurants (NYSE:DRI) brand, has introduced a formal dress code and fragrance policy for guests. The policy restricts attire considered too casual and allows staff to deny service to customers with strong or offensive odors. This shift is intended to reinforce Capital Grille’s premium dining positioning across its locations. Darden Restaurants, trading at $202.37, operates Capital Grille as one of its higher end concepts, and this new policy signals how carefully...
